description: Pre-generated football timeline commentator clips for the first playable-news penalty scenario.
qualityNote: Prototype voice pack. Replace with licensed human or neural commentator clips for production.

clips.line: Wait wait! That is not the taker! A fan has taken the shot!
The stadium has lost its mind. This timeline is officially absurd.
The ball has disappeared! VAR is checking which universe owns it!
Nobody knows if this is a goal, a glitch, or evidence.
Top corner! That is not a goal, that is a rewritten memory!
Clip that. This is the version people will argue about tomorrow.
It is in! Clean timeline, pure pressure release!
The crowd erupts, the camera shakes, and the timeline locks in.
Off the post! One inch from rewriting the group chat!
Listen to that silence. One inch just changed the whole night.
Saved! The keeper read the future and slapped it away!
That reaction is why this moment still hurts.
Oh no! That ball may need a visa to come back down!
The stadium cannot decide whether to laugh or cry.
